review_title: Great SEO content optimizer (some bugs and a bit pricey)
author: Marco C.
pros: Optimizing existing content is incredibly easy. You just have to input the URL, and you'll receive an actionable checklist of improvements. The AI writer produces good content in English. The outline builder is easy to use and produces a strong article structure.
cons: The AI writer doesn't produce usable content in Italian. The AI credits are consumed fast if you use the "concepts" feature. The price is my main concern: if you decide to produce content on a large scale I think other products can be better than Outranking (even if it's one of the best when considering SEO optimization + AI writing)

review_title: The best long-form SEO assistant on the market
description: Overall I'm really happy with it. It's saving me a lot of time, especially in the research phase and outline building. I don't use it too much for AI writing, but mainly for content optimization, and it's amazing for this!
author: Gaia B.
pros: Outranking is probably the best long-form assistant on the market for SEO copywriting. It gives you many insights regarding NLP terms, content structure and outline, and tone of voice optimization. It's incredibly feature-rich, and it's guaranteed for you to publish content that ranks if you follow their guidelines.
cons: The main problems are not related to the software (Outranking) but to the technology (AI) The main con of using AI for content writing is the lack of human expertise required to create high-quality, engaging pieces. This means that if an AI-generated piece falls short, it could be difficult or even impossible to correct. Another potential downside is that as artificial intelligence becomes more sophisticated and capable, it may become increasingly difficult to distinguish between genuine insights from a machine and flattery from a human author. In fact, GPT-3 (the AI used for content generation by Outranking) is not factual, and the platform is missing fact-checking. Relying too much on AI can make you produce wrong content that rank well, creating a negative sentiment from your users. Also, to write proper content, the AI needs a lot of sources, so if you write about a new topic on the internet (meaning there are only a few articles on it, or even 0) it has no reference to produce this content, ending up generating random things about unrelated topics. That is incredibly rare, but not that rare if you are writing in another language (once I was writing about some specific hair shampoo in Italian, and it generated some blockchain and crypto content).

review_title: A rough introduction into the world of generated SEO articles
description: Love/Hate relationship that did not work out in the end. Time is sadly money in this case.
author: Robert K.
pros: That it gave an immense boost at the start to blog post ranking
cons: The most annoying thing was the constant reinvention of the wheel with what felt like every second update

review_title: Best Content Marketing Tool I Purchased This Year
description: Outranking is an excellent SEO and content marketing company. They are affordable and deliver high-quality work. I have had the opportunity to work with Outranking for my blog, and the tool has helped me rank higher on Google. I took a subscription for my personal use and as well a subscription for my company. That's how much I enjoy the product.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Outranking is a great tool for anyone who wants to develop a strong online presence. The site offers a variety of services, including SEO, content marketing, article writing and more. I have been using the site for some time now and have been very impressed with the results. I am currently using Outranking to create SEO friendly content for my blogs and it is working well.
cons: The limit. While I don't use AI Credits that much, I believe a keyword lookup/SERP analysis for a keyword should include both mobile and desktop search data. Now I lose two credits for one keyword.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Using Outranking Helps Me Write SEO-Friendly Articles.
description: I've had a great experience with Outranking. They are very professional and always updates the platform. I've been able to see some great results with the help of this content writing tool.
author: Jesus G.
pros: Outranking offers various tactics - including keyword research and on-page optimisation - and helps me make my website more competitive than my competitors in the search engine results pages (SERPs).
cons: There are a few cons to outranking: 1. It can be time-consuming. 2. It can be difficult to know where to start. 3. It can be hard to use all features offered. 4. You might need to spend some time watching the provided tutorials if you want to use the full power f the tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This is my #1 software that I use that has propelled my business. I'm so freakin' happy with it overall!
author: Elizabeth N.
pros: It creates great outlines. It works better than Jarvis and Surfer SEO. It writes (somewhat) accurate content unlike other AI.
cons: It is beta so has some glitches, they've all since been fixed QUICKLY.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, Outrankig helps you improve your content and make it more engaging to read, rather than just suggesting keywords. Great tools that will help me enhance my agency's SEO results and increase our search traffic! This software is fantastic. It saves me a lot of time and is incredibly user-friendly. A supportive Facebook group. This is honestly a promising AI.
author: Jean Bertin C.
pros: I’ve been using AI writing tools like this to create high-ranking articles for my website for months. I've had Outranking for a couple of weeks and it has really helped me as well, especially in terms of finding the right concept in each section and improving the overall flow of my content. The way it guides you through writing an article is the thing I enjoy the most. It goes beyond just suggesting keywords that will boost your search ranking and actually helps make your content optimized and interesting to read. Excited to keep using these tools that are meant to help improve SEO rankings for my agency website so we can increase search traffic over time! I really appreciate this software. It saves me a lot of time every day and the functionality is simple to use. An active Facebook community for help and support. Really really Promising AI.
cons: In my opinion, the user interface could be more user-friendly. On the other hand, Be warned that even though it is one of the best tools in the market, It is not cost-effective in terms of credits usage. It can eat through credits if you rely on it too much but makes things easy. Be also aware the AI uses characters and not words. However. you can optimize without using any credits. This is one of the best tools in a long time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I've really enjoyed the entire experience.
author: John H.
pros: I love how it breaks down the content and it gives me a path to get better! Its an SEO tool, content optimizer, and AI tool all in one its an amazing tool.
cons: Probably just limits within the software its definitely the most functional writing software I've seen.

description: I was hoping this would speed up my blog writing for my own business, rather than for my clients, as I never seem to have enough time to write for my own website. However, I was not convinced it would do that. Therefore, I couldn't justify spending $49 a month on this tool. To make matters worse, the company charged my credit card $49 even though this was meant to be a free trial. I received no refund after cancelling my membership within two weeks. Despite contacting them three times, they have not responded to me. Very disappointed.
author: Helen M.
pros: There are some nice features to this tool. It finds SERP ideas almost instantaneously, and you can easily select which ones you want to create your first draft, cutting down your research time. You can quickly drill down and deselect anything that you don't want to use. It also makes ready suggestions for your titles and meta descriptions, which you can easily edit them. Features such as on-page SEO score and section builder are very useful, as is the constantly updated preview of your draft.
cons: My biggest complaint is that I didn't find this tool intuitive to use. I found myself constantly referring to the help documentation and videos to proceed with the next step. It was very laborious. I appreciate there is a learning curve, but producing my first draft took me longer than if I had written it all manually. In addition, I didn't realize straight away that, every time you click "generate" for more ideas on a particular section, you're using up your allotted number of credits. So, even though you're on a plan for, say, 10 documents a month, you have a limit number of credits to use within those 10 documents.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: New kid on the Seo block
description: Ouranking does cater to its brand name with some minir issues here and there. It does its job on a fair level and provides me relevant data about soecific keywords. A lot of keyword inspirations are also coming from this tool to help me get fresh new ideas.
author: Coën V.
pros: - seo data insights - easy workflow for copy creation including releveant seo data - accurate SERP to know what to write about - feature richt text editor with AI capabilities - clean UI
cons: - some niches and data throw 0 results, just needs a few tries tho - AI limits are based on characters and not words -
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: You get a depth of data that will help you to quickly research content as well as build content designed to rank.
cons: The UI could be improved to be more in line with other SEO tools to make it slightly more user friendly

review_title: SEO Content writing is no stress with Outranking
description: As a content marketer and SEO Specialist, Outranking is my first tool to start writing content by outlining and the last tool to optimize the content. My overall experience with Outranking is really fascinating.
author: hm H.
pros: I mostly like the excellent guide for outlining the SEO content strategy and the optimization of the content in every step using AI. The most exciting of Outranking is its SERP Analysis and keyword suggestion.
cons: Most of the things of Outranking really stunning. But there are some issues which should be taken care of. The first thing is its comparatively difficult learning curve. Another thing is its user interface which seems little bit messy to me.

review_title: A tool that does the job quite well.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Concepts feature is pretty new and unique from the other tools that are out there. When one compares Outranking - this is clearly the feature that stands apart from the rest.
cons: UI/UX is pretty weak and doesn't appeal to most. Customer Support is a bit off at times, there were contradicting responses from two of their staff support members.

author: Rajratna S.
pros: Since I have been using this tool for a few months and I'm pretty satisfied with this tool. Especially if you are looking to generate SEO optimized content then you should go for it. From MetaTittle to Meta description and Heading tag everything you can write on this single platform. Not only this, besides this it also shows you your SEO score over your competitor. So you have a clear idea on how your content going to rank on search engine.
cons: It would be nice if they add more templates to create other kinds of content.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I liked working with Outranking, but I missed content optimization part. A combination of MarketMuse and Outranking may be match created in heaven, specially with MarketMuse creating free account. I have done research and content crreation in Outranking. Outranking also have taken care of headline optimization. For text optimization I have used MarketMuse. This combination was really usefull. Outranking also supports foreign languages, like Polish for instance.
author: Klemen V.
pros: Outranking covers SEO optmization of meta data, title, headlines, not just the text alone.
cons: I lacked LSI optimization like Frase or MarketMuse. This may be resolved with newer versions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Get traffic using AI and optimized content
description: It makes it faster and easier to write content, but not only that, if you are new to SEO like me, it helps you with tips on what to do so that your content is going to rank in the google search results.
author: Peter Bachmann D.
pros: Outranking.io helps me to create great content for my website easily, it both helps me write it using AI, and it also allows me to create SEO-optimized content.
cons: It's still a young platform, but it already has a lot of great features ready to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
